title: bidens cervicata
intro: Bidens cervicata, also known as tick-trefoil, is a flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Bidens cervicata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
